changeSet.author: match-poll-consumer
changeSet.comment: Create match_robot role with read/write access to match_day tables only
changeSet.sql: GRANT USAGE ON SCHEMA match_day TO match_robot;
GRANT SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA match_day TO match_robot;
GRANT USAGE ON ALL SEQUENCES IN SCHEMA match_day TO match_robot;
ALTER DEFAULT PRIVILEGES IN SCHEMA match_day GRANT SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE ON TABLES TO match_robot;
ALTER DEFAULT PRIVILEGES IN SCHEMA match_day GRANT USAGE ON SEQUENCES TO match_robot;
